creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Dec 17 13:20:19 UTC 2016
New revision: 428760
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/428760

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.0
  - Do not silence installation message
  - While I'm here:
    - Move LIB_DEPENDS upwards
    - Use = instead of += for CONFIGURE_ARGS and USES
    - Convert to options helper
    - Use TEST_TARGET

  Changes:	https://unbound.nlnetlabs.nl/pipermail/unbound-users/2016-December/004587.html
  PR:		215322
  Submitted by:	Jaap Akkerhuis <jaap@NLnetLabs.nl> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/dns/unbound/Makefile
  head/dns/unbound/distinfo
  head/dns/unbound/pkg-plist
